message:
test: enrich gc_pause and observability_channel_model with serde roundtrips and edge case coverage

gc_pause.rs (+243 lines):
- Add PauseBudget serde roundtrip, JSON field name validation, and
  default value tests
- Add PauseRecord serde roundtrip and clone equality tests
- Test PauseTracker budget enforcement with boundary values
- Validate Display formatting for all GC pause error types
- Test edge cases: zero budgets, maximum values, budget transitions

observability_channel_model.rs (+527 lines):
- Add RateDistortionEnvelope edge cases: past-last-frontier queries,
  duplicate distortion points, empty frontier behavior
- Add PayloadFamily serde roundtrip and Display coverage
- Test DistortionMetric exhaustive matching and comparison
- Add ChannelCapacity allocation, overflow, and saturation tests
- Validate telemetry envelope construction and schema versioning
- Test observer subscription lifecycle and channel teardown

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
